name_en: Top-tier Original M13257✨ Supports NXP Chip Dynamic Chip❤️ This Speedy Soft 30 handbag is crafted from soft coated canvas, depicting a full Monogram pattern in vibrant rainbow tones, highlighting the dynamic style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series. Constructed of calfskin for the Toron handle and detachable shoulder strap, metal corners recall classic luggage elements, while the bow-shaped key pouch and lock add a brand touch.
name_cn:

Constructed of calfskin for the Toron handle and detachable shoulder strap, metal corners recall classic luggage elements, while the bow-shaped key pouch and lock add a brand touch.
21 x 17 x 30 cm
(H x W x Length)
